article.title: Sellers circumvent Lenovo’s retro handheld ban with cheap wholesale storefronts — $41 gray-market G02 units pop up on Alibaba following initial storefront purge, systems were pulled from sale amid copyright drama and regional restrictions
article.summary: Lenovo has pulled the G02 from sale on different Chinese e-commerce platforms after the company discovered that it was being sold outside of China.
article.title_zh: 賣家繞過 Lenovo 復古手持設備禁令，使用廉價批發線上商城 — 初次商店清除後，$41 灰市 G02 單位出現在阿里巴巴，系統因版權糾紛和地區限制而下架
article.summary_zh: Lenovo 在發現 G02 被銷售到中國境外後，已在多個中國電商平臺下架該產品。

article.title: After Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire, AI chip startup Groq reportedly raising $650M
article.summary: Chipmaker Groq is looking to raise $650 million in internal funding as it pivots from hardware to focus more on AI inference, the process of refining the way AI models respond to prompted requests, per Axios.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 200 億美元「非併購」後，AI 晶片新創公司 Groq 據報融資 6.5 億美元
article.summary_zh: 晶片製造商 Groq 正在尋求融資 6.5 億美元，以從硬體轉向專注於 AI 推論，即精化 AI 模型對提示請求的回應方式的過程。

article.title: Huawei chairman thanks the US for export restrictions on chips, says it supercharged China’s semiconductor industry — Washington’s export controls encouraged Chinese firms to invest in R&D and build their own tech stack competing with American tech
article.summary: Huawei's current Rotating Chairman thanked the United States for its export bans, which boosted the progress of China's semiconductor industry. He made the comment after unveiling the groundbreaking LogicFolding chip architecture, when reporters asked him how the company came up with the idea.
article.title_zh: 華為董事長感謝美國的芯片出口限制，稱其加速了中國半導體產業發展 — 華盛頓的出口管制促使中國企業增加研發投資並構建與美國技術競爭的自主技術棧
article.summary_zh: 華為現任輪值董事長感謝美國的出口禁令促進了中國半導體產業進步，並在推出突破性 LogicFolding 芯片架構後表達了這一立場。

article.title: Replit’s vibe coding platform just got a Visa-backed identity layer for AI agents — and it changes how agents spend money
article.summary: Replit is deepening its enterprise push: The vibe coding platform is partnering with Visa Inc. to embed payment infrastructure alongside its software development tools, a move that positions Replit at the intersection of AI-native development and agentic commerce. The Foster City, California-based company announced this week that Visa has made a strategic investment in Replit, and the two companies are collaborating to integrate Visa Intelligent Commerce capabilities into the Replit development environment. The partnership gives developers access to core payment building blocks — including tokenization, authentication, wallet management, and payment instructions — natively within their agent-building workflows, a Visa spokesperson tells The New Stack . The amount of the investm
article.title_zh: Replit 的 vibe 編碼平台剛獲得 Visa 支持的 AI 代理身份層——改變了代理花費金錢的方式
article.summary_zh: Replit 加強企業推進：該 vibe 編碼平台與 Visa Inc. 合作，將支付基礎設施嵌入其軟體開發工具中，將 Replit 定位在 AI 原生開發與代理商務的交匯點。

article.title: Nvidia and Microsoft tease "a new era of PC" ahead of Computex 2026 — coordinated social media posts could indicate that rumored N1X laptops will be Windows on Arm systems
article.summary: An Nvidia-powered Arm PC running Windows could inspire new local AI experiences beyond Copilot+.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 和 Microsoft 在 Computex 2026 前預告「PC 的新時代」——協調的社群媒體貼文可能表明傳言中的 N1X 筆電將是 Windows on Arm 系統
article.summary_zh: 由 Nvidia 驅動的 Arm PC 運行 Windows 可能會激發超越 Copilot+ 的新型本地 AI 體驗。

article.title: Gemini Spark rolls out to Google AI Ultra in the US: How it works
article.summary: As previewed last week, Gemini Spark is now available in the US for Google AI Ultra subscribers. more…
article.title_zh: Gemini Spark 現已向美國 Google AI Ultra 用戶推出：運作方式說明
article.summary_zh: Gemini Spark 現已在美國向 Google AI Ultra 訂閱者提供。

article.title: Kevin O'Leary claims Chinese propaganda is to blame for anti-datacenter backlash, 'hundreds of millions of dollars' being spent to kill US dominance in AI — industry proponents and Trump administration reinforce claims of foreign interference
article.summary: Kevin O'Leary claims Chinese propaganda to blame for anti-datacenter sentiment.
article.title_zh: Kevin O'Leary 聲稱中國宣傳是反資料中心反彈的罪魁禍首，「數億美元」被用於削弱美國在 AI 領域的主導地位 — 業界支持者和川普政府強化了外國干預的指控
article.summary_zh: Kevin O'Leary 宣稱中國宣傳活動是導致反資料中心情緒的原因。

article.title: SoftBank Plans Up to €75 Billion Investment in French AI Centers
article.summary: SoftBank Group Corp. plans to invest as much as €75 billion ($87 billion) to build 5 gigawatts of artificial intelligence data center capacity in France, saying the country is poised to become a top European hub for AI infrastructure.
article.title_zh: 軟銀計畫在法國 AI 數據中心投資最高 750 億歐元
article.summary_zh: 軟銀集團計劃投資最高 750 億歐元（870 億美元）在法國建造 5 GW 的人工智慧數據中心產能，認為法國將成為歐洲 AI 基礎設施的頂級樞紐。

article.title: ATX12VO V3 standard shrinks the connector and maximizes power efficiency — new 8-pin connector also brings smarter power supply monitoring
article.summary: Intel's next-generation 12V-only PSU standard reportedly adds PMBus support, smaller connectors, and improved power efficiency.
article.title_zh: ATX12VO V3 標準縮小連接器並最大化電源效率 — 新 8 pin 連接器還帶來更智能的電源供應監測
article.summary_zh: Intel 下一代 12V 專用電源供應標準據報將新增 PMBus 支持、更小型連接器和改善的電源效率。

article.title: Apple TV’s latest sci-fi series is a winner, and just the start of exciting new direction
article.summary: Apple TV premiered its latest sci-fi series today : Star City. It’s the first of several spinoffs to existing shows that are in the works. Here’s why I’m excited for what it represents for the future of Apple TV. more…
article.title_zh: Apple TV 最新科幻劇集成功推出，標誌令人興奮的新方向的開始
article.summary_zh: Apple TV 推出最新科幻劇集《Star City》，這是多個現有劇集衍生作品中的首部。

article.title: Google Drive rolling out powerful document scanner redesign for higher-end Android devices
article.summary: After testing got underway last year , Google Drive is now rolling out a redesigned document scanner on Android with powerful, on-device features. more…
article.title_zh: Google Drive 為高端 Android 設備推出強大的文件掃描器重設計
article.summary_zh: Google Drive 現已在 Android 上推出重新設計的文件掃描器，具有強大的設備端功能。
